title: lastrea oregana
intro: Lastrea oregana, also known as the Oregana fern or Oregana lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lastrea oregana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies and traditional medicine.
